query:
SELECT m.courseId, m.id as moduleId, m.titleAr, COUNT(q.id) as questionCount
FROM modules m
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.moduleId = m.id
GROUP BY m.courseId, m.id, m.titleAr
ORDER BY m.courseId, m.orderIndex;
